test_cases.input: Which items are non-returnable on ShopEasy?
test_cases.expected_output: Non-returnable items on ShopEasy include perishable goods, digital products after download, personalised or customised items, hygiene products once opened (such as innerwear and swimwear), and hazardous materials.
test_cases.actual_output:
The following items are non-returnable on ShopEasy:

- Digital products, software licenses, and downloadable content.
- Hazardous materials and items with safety seals broken.
- Perishable goods beyond the 2-day window.
- Customised or personalised products.
- Items explicitly marked as non-returnable on the product listing.
- Underwear, lingerie, and swimwear for hygiene reasons.

test_cases.input: What happens if a ShopEasy delivery attempt fails?
test_cases.expected_output: ShopEasy makes up to 3 delivery attempts. If all three attempts fail, the package is returned to the seller and a refund is initiated.
test_cases.actual_output: If a ShopEasy delivery attempt fails, the company will make up to 3 delivery attempts on consecutive business days. After 3 failed attempts, the package will be returned to the seller, and a refund will be initiated. If you need to reschedule delivery, you can contact customer support or update your delivery instructions in the app.

test_cases.input: How do I recover my ShopEasy account password?
test_cases.expected_output: To recover your ShopEasy password, click 'Forgot your password?' on the sign-in page. An OTP will be sent to your registered email or mobile number. Passwords must be at least 8 characters and include a mix of letters and numbers. Reset links expire within 15 minutes of issuance.
test_cases.actual_output: To recover your ShopEasy account password, please visit the login page and click on the "Forgot Password?" link. Follow the prompts to reset your password using your registered email address or mobile number. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact ShopEasy Customer Support at 1800-3000-9009 or through the Help page on ShopEasy.in.

test_cases.input: What are my rights if I receive a ShopEasy item that doesn't match its listed condition?
test_cases.expected_output: If you receive an item that does not match its listed condition, you are entitled to a full refund including return shipping costs, a free replacement of the same item, an A-to-Z Guarantee claim if the seller is unresponsive, or escalation to ShopEasy's specialist team for complex cases.
test_cases.actual_output:
If you receive an item from ShopEasy that doesn't match its listed condition, you are entitled to:

- A full refund, including return shipping costs.
- A free replacement of the same item.
- An A-to-Z Guarantee claim if the seller is unresponsive.
- Escalation to ShopEasy's specialist team for complex cases.

If you need further assistance, feel free to ask!
